tasks.title: Start source-watch as review-only
tasks.why: This moves you toward AI operations without risking unauthorized live-data changes.
tasks.objective: Build review cards, then later connect spreadsheet writes behind explicit approval.
steps: Define trusted source fields: source, product, sport, claim, date, confidence, and link.
Create review-only source-watch cards in the Command Center.
Compare source claims against current PRV or Checklist Vault data.
Require admin approval before writing to Sheets or publishing JSON.
Log every approved change for later audit.
tasks.guardrail: Sandbox/review-only. Do not update live Sheets, GitHub, or Apps Script without a separate approval path.
